fields.acceptance_criteria: Retarget imported context-stack tool manifests so standalone context-stack has explicit, documented dependency and workspace decisions for each moved tool.
fields.title: Retarget imported context-stack tool manifests for standalone layout
fields.validation_plan: Run focused cargo check or cargo test commands for each tool admitted into the standalone context-stack workspace and record any intentionally deferred dependency boundaries.

fields.acceptance_criteria: Retarget imported context-stack tool manifests so standalone context-stack has explicit, documented dependency, workspace, and integration decisions for each moved tool.
fields.title: Retarget imported context-stack tool manifests for standalone layout
fields.validation_plan: Before changing manifests, review any files already present under the imported tool paths in ../context-stack so destination overlap is explicit; then run focused cargo check or cargo test commands for each tool admitted into the standalone workspace and record intentionally deferred dependency boundaries.
